requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 (SASO EMC Technical Regulation)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——CISPR 15 / IEC 61547（SASO EMC 技术法规）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——CISPR 15 / IEC 61547（SASO EMC 技術法規）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Saudi market must comply with the SASO Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) technical regulation, which adopts the IEC/CISPR framework. For lighting equipment, conformity is commonly demonstrated against CISPR 15 (IEC equivalent of the lighting radio-disturbance standard), covering conducted emissions on the mains supply terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions (30 MHz–300 MHz). EMC evidence forms part of the SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) technical file. Testing must reflect the 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi mains supply. Luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi smart lighting) additionally require Saudi type approval / radio-equipment registration through the relevant Saudi authority (CST/SASO radio regulation), separate from the lighting EMC assessment.
summary.zh: 在沙特市场销售的 LED 灯具须符合 SASO 电磁兼容（EMC）技术法规，该法规采纳 IEC/CISPR 框架。对于照明设备，合规通常依据 CISPR 15（照明无线电骚扰标准的 IEC 版本）证明，涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。EMC 证据属于 SABER 产品符合性证书（PCoC）技术文件的一部分。检测须反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市电供电。集成无线功能的灯具（如蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi 智能照明）还须通过相关沙特主管机构（CST/SASO 无线电法规）取得沙特型号核准/无线电设备注册，与照明 EMC 评估相互独立。
summary.zht: 在沙特市場銷售的 LED 燈具須符合 SASO 電磁兼容（EMC）技術法規，該法規採納 IEC/CISPR 框架。對於照明設備，合規通常依據 CISPR 15（照明無線電騷擾標準的 IEC 版本）證明，涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。EMC 證據屬於 SABER 產品符合性證書（PCoC）技術文件的一部分。檢測須反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市電供電。集成無線功能的燈具（如藍牙調光、Wi-Fi 智能照明）還須通過相關沙特主管機構（CST/SASO 無線電法規）取得沙特型號核准/無線電設備註冊，與照明 EMC 評估相互獨立。

standards_or_laws: SASO Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) Technical Regulation (IEC/CISPR-based; enforced through SABER PCoC)
CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (lighting emissions basis)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted under the SASO EMC conformity pathway and must be re-presented through a SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Body for the PCoC.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被 SASO EMC 合格评定路径自动接受，须经 SASO 批准的合格评定机构（CAB）重新提交以取得 PCoC。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被 SASO EMC 合格評定路徑自動接受，須經 SASO 批准的合格評定機構（CAB）重新提交以取得 PCoC。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: The Saudi SASO EMC regulation and CN GB 17743 are both derived from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) Saudi conformity is demonstrated through the SABER PCoC issued by a SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Body — EMC evidence is bundled into that PCoC technical file rather than a CN-style CCC EMC certificate; (2) an IECEE CB test report covering CISPR 15 emissions is widely accepted by Saudi CABs and streamlines PCoC issuance — Chinese CNAS labs that are IECEE CB / ILAC members can issue such reports, but confirm the CB report scope covers the SASO-referenced lighting EMC requirements; (3) testing should reflect the 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi supply, which differs from China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz; (4) if the luminaire incorporates wireless functionality, separate Saudi radio-equipment type approval applies in addition to the lighting EMC assessment.
gap.zh: 沙特 SASO EMC 法规与中国 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，因此发射限值基本协调。主要差距：（1）沙特合规通过 SASO 批准的合格评定机构（CAB）签发的 SABER PCoC 证明——EMC 证据并入该 PCoC 技术文件，而非中国式 CCC EMC 证书；（2）涵盖 CISPR 15 发射的 IECEE CB 测试报告被沙特 CAB 广泛接受，可简化 PCoC 签发——作为 IECEE CB / ILAC 成员的中国 CNAS 实验室可出具此类报告，但需确认 CB 报告范围涵盖 SASO 引用的照明 EMC 要求；（3）检测应反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 供电，这与中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 不同；（4）若灯具集成无线功能，除照明 EMC 评估外还须取得独立的沙特无线电设备型号核准。
gap.zht: 沙特 SASO EMC 法規與中國 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，因此發射限值基本協調。主要差距：（1）沙特合規透過 SASO 批准的合格評定機構（CAB）簽發的 SABER PCoC 證明——EMC 證據併入該 PCoC 技術文件，而非中國式 CCC EMC 證書；（2）涵蓋 CISPR 15 發射的 IECEE CB 測試報告被沙特 CAB 廣泛接受，可簡化 PCoC 簽發——作為 IECEE CB / ILAC 成員的中國 CNAS 實驗室可出具此類報告，但需確認 CB 報告範圍涵蓋 SASO 引用的照明 EMC 要求；（3）檢測應反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 供電，這與中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 不同；（4）若燈具集成無線功能，除照明 EMC 評估外還須取得獨立的沙特無線電設備型號核准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the SASO EMC technical regulation applies, and EMC conformity (CISPR 15 basis) must be evidenced in the SABER PCoC technical file before Saudi market placement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: SABER / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires in Saudi Arabia must satisfy the SASO EMC technical regulation, with emissions commonly demonstrated against CISPR 15 and the evidence bundled into the SABER PCoC technical file. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with CN GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted — an IECEE CB report covering CISPR 15 is the practical route, presented through a SASO-approved CAB. Testing should reflect 230/400 V, 60 Hz. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require Saudi radio-equipment type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 沙特 LED 灯具须满足 SASO EMC 技术法规，发射通常依据 CISPR 15 证明，证据并入 SABER PCoC 技术文件。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不被自动接受——经 SASO 批准的 CAB 提交涵盖 CISPR 15 的 IECEE CB 报告是实际路径。检测应反映 230/400 V、60 Hz。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得沙特无线电设备型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 沙特 LED 燈具須滿足 SASO EMC 技術法規，發射通常依據 CISPR 15 證明，證據併入 SABER PCoC 技術文件。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不被自動接受——經 SASO 批准的 CAB 提交涵蓋 CISPR 15 的 IECEE CB 報告是實際路徑。檢測應反映 230/400 V、60 Hz。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得沙特無線電設備型號核准。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — IEC 61547 (Lighting Equipment Immunity Requirements)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——IEC 61547（照明设备抗扰度要求）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——IEC 61547（照明設備抗擾度要求）

summary.en: LED luminaires placed on the Saudi market must meet the immunity requirements of the SASO EMC technical regulation, demonstrating adequate immunity in their intended electromagnetic environment. IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements) is the technical basis commonly used to demonstrate lighting-equipment immunity for the SABER PCoC. Tests include electrostatic discharge (ESD, IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11), with test levels assessed against a 230/400 V, 60 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 进入沙特市场的 LED 灯具须满足 SASO EMC 技术法规的抗扰度要求，在预期电磁环境中具备足够抗扰度。IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求）是通常用于为 SABER PCoC 证明照明设备抗扰度的技术基础。试验项目包括静电放电（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11），试验等级依据 230/400 V、60 Hz 供电评估。
summary.zht: 進入沙特市場的 LED 燈具須滿足 SASO EMC 技術法規的抗擾度要求，在預期電磁環境中具備足夠抗擾度。IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求）是通常用於為 SABER PCoC 證明照明設備抗擾度的技術基礎。試驗項目包括靜電放電（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11），試驗等級依據 230/400 V、60 Hz 供電評估。

standards_or_laws: SASO Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) Technical Regulation (immunity requirements; enforced through SABER PCoC)
IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), which is technically equivalent to IEC 61547:2009. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743. CCC certification for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Passing IEC 61547 immunity testing typically demonstrates performance beyond the requirements typically enforced in the CN market.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。针对中国灯具的 CCC 认证通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。通过 IEC 61547 抗扰度检测通常表明性能超出中国市场通常执行的要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。針對中國燈具的 CCC 認證通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。通過 IEC 61547 抗擾度檢測通常表明性能超出中國市場通常執行的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547:2009)

gap.en: The SASO EMC regulation requires adequate immunity, with IEC 61547 the technical basis commonly used to document lighting-equipment immunity for the SABER PCoC. CN immunity testing under GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard and not universally enforced for all luminaire categories. Because GB/T 18595 and IEC 61547 share the same technical base, products tested and complying with IEC 61547 immunity levels will generally meet or exceed CN GB/T 18595 requirements — the practical gap is primarily a documentation and route gap: the Saudi PCoC technical file should contain IEC 61547 immunity evidence (commonly via an IECEE CB report or a SASO-approved CAB), whereas CN CCC documentation may not include equivalent immunity test reports. Test levels should also reflect the 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi supply.
gap.zh: SASO EMC 法规要求足够抗扰度，IEC 61547 是通常用于为 SABER PCoC 记录照明设备抗扰度的技术基础。中国 GB/T 18595 下的抗扰度测试为推荐性标准，并非对所有灯具类别普遍执行。由于 GB/T 18595 与 IEC 61547 共享同一技术基础，符合 IEC 61547 抗扰度等级的产品通常能满足或超越中国 GB/T 18595 要求——实际差距主要为文件及路径差距：沙特 PCoC 技术文件应包含 IEC 61547 抗扰度证据（通常通过 IECEE CB 报告或 SASO 批准的 CAB），而中国 CCC 文件可能不包含等效抗扰度试验报告。试验等级还应反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 供电。
gap.zht: SASO EMC 法規要求足夠抗擾度，IEC 61547 是通常用於為 SABER PCoC 記錄照明設備抗擾度的技術基礎。中國 GB/T 18595 下的抗擾度測試為推薦性標準，並非對所有燈具類別普遍執行。由於 GB/T 18595 與 IEC 61547 共享同一技術基礎，符合 IEC 61547 抗擾度等級的產品通常能滿足或超越中國 GB/T 18595 要求——實際差距主要為文件及路徑差距：沙特 PCoC 技術文件應包含 IEC 61547 抗擾度證據（通常透過 IECEE CB 報告或 SASO 批准的 CAB），而中國 CCC 文件可能不包含等效抗擾度試驗報告。試驗等級還應反映沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 供電。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the SASO EMC technical regulation requires adequate immunity; IEC 61547 is the technical basis commonly evidenced in the SABER PCoC technical file
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: SABER / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires must satisfy the SASO EMC technical regulation's immunity requirements, with IEC 61547 the technical basis commonly evidenced in the SABER PCoC technical file. Chinese GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard and does not by itself satisfy the Saudi PCoC documentation. The technical content is largely harmonized with IEC 61547, so products already tested to GB/T 18595 may have a reduced re-testing burden, but the PCoC file must contain adequate IEC 61547 immunity evidence (commonly via an IECEE CB report), assessed at 230/400 V, 60 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具须满足 SASO EMC 技术法规的抗扰度要求，IEC 61547 是通常在 SABER PCoC 技术文件中提供证据的技术基础。中国 GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准，本身不足以满足沙特 PCoC 文件要求。技术内容与 IEC 61547 基本协调，因此已按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品可能减少重新测试负担，但 PCoC 文件须包含充分的 IEC 61547 抗扰度证据（通常通过 IECEE CB 报告），并按 230/400 V、60 Hz 评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具須滿足 SASO EMC 技術法規的抗擾度要求，IEC 61547 是通常在 SABER PCoC 技術文件中提供證據的技術基礎。中國 GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準，本身不足以滿足沙特 PCoC 文件要求。技術內容與 IEC 61547 基本協調，因此已按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品可能減少重新測試負擔，但 PCoC 文件須包含充分的 IEC 61547 抗擾度證據（通常透過 IECEE CB 報告），並按 230/400 V、60 Hz 評估。
